testcase.name: test_websocket_rejects_invalid_token

failure.message: TimeoutError: timed out while waiting for handshake response

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_features.py:286: in test_websocket_rejects_invalid_token ws = connect(url, open_timeout=10) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/sync/client.py:381: in connect connection.handshake( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/sync/client.py:95: in handshake raise TimeoutError("timed out while waiting for handshake response") E TimeoutError: timed out while waiting for handshake response

testcase.name: test_websocket_accepts_valid_token_and_message

failure.message: TimeoutError: timed out while waiting for handshake response
